summary: Lane AH-002 completed. Created packages/opencode/test/tool/cache.test.ts with 6 concurrency test scenarios for the ToolCache. 5/6 tests pass. Test 2 (compute failure propagation) reveals the inflight dedup race condition that lane AH-001 is fixing — all 10 concurrent fibers independently run compute instead of deduping. The test expects correct post-fix behavior (computeCount=1) which will pass once the atomic check-and-set fix lands. Tests 1, 3, 4, 5, and 6 all pass on current code. Typecheck is clean for the test file. No modifications to cache.ts.
